productDisplayName: Puma Unisex Benecio Leather Blue Shoes
description: There’s no keeping a low profile with these low-profile Benecio Drip shoes from puma. The simple design and durable construction goes well with everything. These shoes have a leather upper for instant style and durability, cushioned midsole for comfort and stability and rubber outsole for maximum traction - perfect for urban life!UpperCrinkled-leather upper for durability, style and comfortPadded collar and tongue for enhanced comfort and snug FitLeather formstripe detail on the sidesHigh ankle support for comfort to the lower legBrand name embossed on the heel guard and ankle for styleBreathable fabric lining and a cushioned footbed for all-day comfort.MidsoleTPU and EVA midsole combined to give you support and ample cushioningOutsoleTextured durable rubber outsole for maximum traction and gripshoe careWipe surface with a dry, clean cloth to remove dustUse a branded leather conditioner and leather brush to restore shineDo not store in direct sunlight
